import paramiko
import sys

client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\('185.173.110.180', username='root', password='1982Xandeq1982#', timeout=15\)

stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command\('docker ps --format \\"table {{.Names}}\\\\t{{.Status}}\\\\t{{.Ports}}\\"'\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
print\(stderr.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
client.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python << 'PYEOF'
import paramiko

client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\('185.173.110.180', username='root', password='1982Xandeq1982#', timeout=15\)

# Restart EasyPanel container
stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command\('docker restart acdc8646d51c 2>&1'\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
print\(stderr.read\(\).decode\(\)[:200]\)
client.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python << 'PYEOF'
import paramiko

client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\('185.173.110.180', username='root', password='1982Xandeq1982#', timeout=15\)

# Get new container ID after restart
stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command\('docker ps --filter name=easypanel --format "{{.ID}} {{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
client.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python << 'PYEOF'
import paramiko

client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\('185.173.110.180', username='root', password='1982Xandeq1982#', timeout=15\)

# Read one of the traefik dynamic configs to understand the format
stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command\('cat /etc/easypanel/traefik/config/postiz.yaml 2>/dev/null'\)
print\("=== postiz.yaml \(example\) ==="\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)[:800]\)

stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command\('cat /etc/easypanel/traefik/config/main.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -60'\)
print\("\\n=== main.yaml ==="\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)[:600]\)

# Check Supabase URL from existing projects  
stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command\('cat /etc/easypanel/projects/supabase/supabase/code/supabase/code/.env 2>/dev/null | head -30'\)
print\("\\n=== supabase .env ==="\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)[:500]\)

client.close\(\)
PYEOF)
